name: cloudflare-images
title: Cloudflare Images
description: Upload images to Cloudflare Images from your clipboard, Finder, or anywhere on your Mac. Includes a browser for your uploaded images. Unofficial.
author: miguel_caetano_dias

commands.name: validate-credentials
commands.title: Validate Cloudflare Credentials
commands.subtitle: Cloudflare Images
commands.description: Pings the Cloudflare Images API to confirm your Account ID, API Token, and Account Hash are configured correctly.

commands.name: upload-clipboard
commands.title: Upload Clipboard Image
commands.subtitle: Cloudflare Images
commands.description: Reads the image currently on your clipboard, uploads it to Cloudflare Images, and pastes the formatted URL at the cursor. Pass an optional output format (Markdown, HTML, or Raw URL) at the dropdown to override your preference for this invocation.

commands.name: upload-clipboard-markdown
commands.title: Upload Clipboard as Markdown
commands.subtitle: Cloudflare Images
commands.description: Uploads the clipboard image and pastes the URL as Markdown — ![filename](url) — regardless of your default output format. Bind a hotkey if you live in Markdown.

commands.name: upload-clipboard-html
commands.title: Upload Clipboard as HTML
commands.subtitle: Cloudflare Images
commands.description: Uploads the clipboard image and pastes an HTML tag, regardless of your default output format.

commands.name: upload-clipboard-url
commands.title: Upload Clipboard as URL
commands.subtitle: Cloudflare Images
commands.description: Uploads the clipboard image and pastes only the raw URL — no Markdown or HTML wrapping — regardless of your default output format. The 'just give me the link' path for Slack, JSON fields, CSS, etc.

commands.name: upload-finder
commands.title: Upload Selected File
commands.subtitle: Cloudflare Images
commands.description: Uploads the image(s) currently selected in Finder to Cloudflare Images. Multiple images are joined newline-separated and copied to the clipboard.

commands.name: upload-finder-markdown
commands.title: Upload Selected File as Markdown
commands.subtitle: Cloudflare Images
commands.description: Uploads selected Finder image(s) and copies the URL(s) as Markdown, regardless of your default output format.

commands.name: upload-finder-html
commands.title: Upload Selected File as HTML
commands.subtitle: Cloudflare Images
commands.description: Uploads selected Finder image(s) and copies HTML tag(s), regardless of your default output format.

commands.name: upload-finder-url
commands.title: Upload Selected File as URL
commands.subtitle: Cloudflare Images
commands.description: Uploads selected Finder image(s) and copies only the raw URL(s), regardless of your default output format. The 'just give me the link' path for Finder uploads.

commands.name: my-images
commands.title: My Cloudflare Images
commands.subtitle: Cloudflare Images
commands.description: Browse, copy URLs from, and delete the images in your Cloudflare Images account.

commands.name: set-default-variant
commands.title: Set Default Variant
commands.subtitle: Cloudflare Images
commands.description: Pick the default variant for new uploads and URL formatting from a list fetched from your Cloudflare Images account. Overrides the Default Variant textfield in preferences.

preferences.name: accountId
preferences.title: Cloudflare Account ID
preferences.description: Your Cloudflare Account ID. Found in the URL of your Cloudflare dashboard (the long alphanumeric string after dash.cloudflare.com/).

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: Cloudflare API Token
preferences.description: API Token with the 'Cloudflare Images: Edit' permission. Stored in Raycast's encrypted preferences. Create one at dash.cloudflare.com → My Profile → API Tokens.

preferences.name: accountHash
preferences.title: Cloudflare Account Hash
preferences.description: The public hash that appears in your image URLs (imagedelivery.net/{hash}/...). Copy it from the Cloudflare Images dashboard.

preferences.name: defaultVariant
preferences.title: Default Variant (fallback)
preferences.description: Variant appended to delivery URLs. Conventionally /public. Run 'Set Default Variant' to pick from a live list of your account's variants — that selection takes precedence over this textfield.

preferences.name: outputFormat
preferences.title: Output Format
preferences.description: How URLs are written back to your clipboard after upload.

preferences.name: useSignedUrls
preferences.title: Signed URLs
preferences.label: Generate signed URLs for new uploads
preferences.description: Requires a signing key. The extension fetches one automatically from the Cloudflare API the first time it's needed (and caches it). You can also override with a manual key below.

preferences.name: signedUrlExpiration
preferences.title: Signed URL Expiration (seconds)
preferences.description: Set to 0 for no expiry. Only applies when Signed URLs are enabled.

preferences.name: manualSigningKey
preferences.title: Manual Signing Key (optional)
preferences.description: Optional override. If set, this value is used directly for HMAC signing and the auto-fetch from the Cloudflare API is skipped entirely. Leave blank to use the automatic flow — most users want that.

preferences.name: addMetadata
preferences.title: Attach Metadata to Uploads
preferences.label: Tag each uploaded image with metadata
preferences.description: When on, the JSON template below is rendered and attached to every upload, surfacing in the Cloudflare Images dashboard and in My Cloudflare Images. When off, images upload with no metadata.

preferences.name: metadataTemplate
preferences.title: Metadata Template (JSON)
preferences.description: JSON object of metadata key-value pairs. Dynamic placeholders: ${fileName}, ${timestamp} (ISO 8601), ${date} (YYYY-MM-DD), ${time} (HH:MM:SS), ${fileSize} (bytes), ${fileExtension}, ${surfaceVersion}, ${workspaceName}. Cloudflare caps total metadata at 1024 bytes after rendering. Leave blank to use the default. Invalid JSON silently falls back to the default with a toast warning.

preferences.name: enableCompression
preferences.title: Compression
preferences.label: Compress images that exceed the max size
preferences.description: Automatically compress images larger than the threshold using sharp before uploading.

preferences.name: maxFileSizeMB
preferences.title: Max File Size (MB)
preferences.description: Compression target. Cloudflare's hard limit is 10 MB for the standard plan.

preferences.name: compressionQuality
preferences.title: Compression Quality
preferences.description: 1–100. Lower values produce smaller files at lower quality.

preferences.name: preservePngFormat
preferences.title: Preserve PNG Format
preferences.label: Keep PNGs as PNGs when compressing
preferences.description: Off: PNGs become JPEG when compressed (smaller, lossy). On: PNGs stay PNG (larger, lossless).

preferences.name: avifConversionFormat
preferences.title: AVIF Conversion Format
preferences.description: AVIF inputs are converted to this format before upload (Cloudflare Images does not accept AVIF as input).

scripts.prepublishOnly: echo "Use 'npm run publish' to publish to the Raycast Store." && exit 1
